action.reasoning: Observation: The crash happens because z_vals has 65532 elements while rays_o has 65536, meaning 4 rays missed the bounding box and were filtered out, but rays_o was not filtered. Analysis: I need to see the exact code of NeRFRenderer to understand how it filters rays and what bounding box it uses, so I can either pre-filter the rays before passing them to the renderer, or pad the results. Decision: Print the contents of nerf_source.py.
